com.saxonica.ee.stream.om

Class FleetingParentNode

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.saxonica.ee.stream.om.FleetingNode
      • com.saxonica.ee.stream.om.FleetingParentNode
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    javax.xml.transform.Source, PullEvent, Item, NodeInfo, Sequence
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    FleetingDocumentNode, FleetingElementNode

    public abstract class FleetingParentNode
extends FleetingNode
    A streamed document or element node. This abstract class maintains information about the number of child nodes that have been read, broken down by node kind and node name, so that positional predicates can be supported in patterns and child selections

    • Field Summary

    • Method Detail

      • incrementChildCount

        public void incrementChildCount(int nodeKind,
                       NodeName name)

      • getPosition

        public int getPosition(NodeTest nodeTest)
                throws XPathException
        Get the position of the last child node encountered. This method must be called AFTER incrementChildCount has been called in respect of that child.
        Parameters:
        nodeTest - filters the nodes to be counted
        Returns:
        the number of previous siblings (plus the current node) that match the node test
        Throws:
        XPathException - for an unsupported kind of NodeTest
